text:
# Complaints Letter Generation  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
Challenge:  
Nationwide receive over 1000 complaints per week. Each Complaint must be reviewed and the outcome crafted into a final response letter.  
This letter takes 45 minutes to manually write and there were quality and consistency concerns.  
Developed Solution:  
Deterministic Gen AI letter generator, that uses Retrieval Augmented Generation to refer to gold standard letters and complaint case notes to generate professional letters.  
Use case learnings – Pathfinder for delivery and governance defined, repeatable patterns  
logo  
Complaint hander population planned post system upgrade  
100%  
90%  
Time saving on AI Generated Letters (45mins to 4)  
Very good or good ratings from existing complaint handlers for the vast majority of AI-generated examples  
High Quality
name: Chunk 12/14

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: A major financial services and insurance provider referenced as the client undergoing a generative AI transformation to automate and standardize the handling of high volumes of customer complaints.
context: Nationwide receive over 1000 complaints per week.
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025

raw_entities.name: Deterministic Gen AI Letter Generator
raw_entities.description: A custom-built generative AI application designed to automate the drafting of final response letters for customer complaints, leveraging retrieval-augmented generation against standardized templates and case notes to ensure professional and compliant output.
context: Deterministic Gen AI letter generator, that uses Retrieval Augmented Generation to refer to gold standard letters and complaint case notes to generate professional letters.
Complaints Letter Generation

raw_entities.name: Manual Complaint Response Processing
raw_entities.description: The client's existing manual workflow for reviewing complaints and drafting final response letters, which is highly time-consuming and suffers from inconsistent quality and compliance risks.
context: Each Complaint must be reviewed and the outcome crafted into a final response letter.
This letter takes 45 minutes to manually write and there were quality and consistency concerns.

raw_entities.name: High Complaint Volume
raw_entities.description: The high volume of customer complaints received weekly, creating a bottleneck in the manual response process and straining existing operational capacity.
context: Nationwide receive over 1000 complaints per week.

raw_entities.name: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)
raw_entities.description: The core AI technique used to ground the generative model on authoritative 'gold standard' letters and specific complaint case notes, ensuring accurate, compliant, and contextually relevant output.
context: uses Retrieval Augmented Generation to refer to gold standard letters and complaint case notes

raw_entities.name: Automated Complaint Response Generation
raw_entities.description: The application of the AI solution to automate the drafting of professional response letters for customer complaints, streamlining the complaint handler workflow and improving turnaround times.
context: Complaint hander population planned post system upgrade
generate professional letters

raw_entities.name: Significant Time Reduction
raw_entities.description: A dramatic reduction in the time required to draft complaint response letters, cutting the manual process from 45 minutes down to just 4 minutes per letter.
context: Time saving on AI Generated Letters (45mins to 4)

raw_entities.name: Improved Quality & Consistency
raw_entities.description: Enhanced output quality and consistency in complaint response letters, validated by high ratings from existing complaint handlers and the elimination of previous manual inconsistencies.
context: there were quality and consistency concerns.
Very good or good ratings from existing complaint handlers for the vast majority of AI-generated examples
High Quality

raw_entities.name: Gen AI Platform
raw_entities.description: The underlying generative artificial intelligence technology powering the letter generation solution, enabling automated content creation based on structured and unstructured data inputs.
context: Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
Deterministic Gen AI letter generator

raw_entities.name: Deterministic AI Approach
raw_entities.description: The use of a deterministic Gen AI model rather than a purely probabilistic one, ensuring predictable, reliable, and compliant output for sensitive customer communications and regulatory environments.
context: Deterministic Gen AI letter generator

raw_entities.name: Pathfinder Governance Framework
raw_entities.description: A defined delivery and governance methodology ('Pathfinder') that establishes repeatable patterns and structured governance for AI implementation, ensuring scalable and compliant rollout.
context: Use case learnings – Pathfinder for delivery and governance defined, repeatable patterns

raw_entities.name: IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
raw_entities.description: A 2025 demonstration event showcasing the Gen AI capabilities and the Nationwide case study, highlighting the solution's impact on complaint handling workflows.
context: Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The technology and consulting firm delivering the Gen AI solution, conducting the demo, and providing the underlying AI platform and governance frameworks.
context: Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
